rows.label: qev091401_MSG0001
rows.name: Um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0002
rows.name: Sooo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0003
rows.name: There's a mission I'd like your help with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0004
rows.name: It's from an Arms team working on a new Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I guess they found some strange...things
during tests in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0006
rows.name:
They've asked us to investigate
them and find out what they are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0031
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0032
rows.name: Ask Fog Christoph to tell you more about the "things."

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0033
rows.name: Probe

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0034
rows.name: Ask how this is a Landbanker mission.

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0007
rows.name: I know. I'm curious, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0008
rows.name:
But I'm afraid we don't know
anything specific at the moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0009
rows.name: That's kind of the point, actually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0010
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0011
rows.name: Yeah, fair point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0012
rows.name:
This would normally be a
Collepedian kind of job, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0013
rows.name: But I asked them to make an exception for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0014
rows.name: I want to become a more well-rounded BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Someone more like you or my brother—
a man who can handle any mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0016
rows.name:
I feel like I've only just discovered
what I want to be since I met you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0035
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0036
rows.name: Tell Fog Christoph that he'll catch up in no time.

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0037
rows.name: Downplay

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0038
rows.name: Say that you are nothing special.

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0039
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0040
rows.name: Ask Fog Christoph if his brother is still alive.

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0017
rows.name: I'll do my best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0018
rows.name:
If I keep completing missions and building
trust, I hope to make my brother proud.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0019
rows.name:
I beg to differ. Even your
humility is exceptional.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0020
rows.name:
I know if I keep building trust like you
have, my brother will be proud of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0021
rows.name: Still...alive?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Oh, sorry, did I give the
impression that he was dead?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0023
rows.name:
No, he's very much alive. He
works with the Interceptor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0024
rows.name: It's just... We're not close right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0025
rows.name:
But if I keep completing missions and
building trust, I hope I can make him proud.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0026
rows.name: ...Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091401_MSG0027
rows.name: Anyway, should we go?[ST:wait ]
